simple_types.name: CONFIG_HALT_Field
simple_types.code:
type CONFIG_HALT_Field is
   Pause,
   Run)
  with Size => 1;

enumeration_literals.name: Pause
enumeration_literals.description: Do not pause watchdog while the CPU is halted by the debugger.

simple_types.name: CONFIG_SLEEP_Field
simple_types.code:
type CONFIG_SLEEP_Field is
   Pause,
   Run)
  with Size => 1;

enumeration_literals.name: Pause
enumeration_literals.description: Do not pause watchdog while the CPU is asleep.

record_types.name: CONFIG_Register

fields.name: Reserved_1_2
fields.description:
Configure the watchdog to pause or not while the CPU is halted by the
debugger.

WDT_Peripheral

fields.name: REQSTATUS
fields.description: Counter reload value in number of 32kiHz clock cycles.

variables.name: WDT_Periph
variables.code:
WDT_Periph : aliased WDT_Peripheral
  with Import, Address => WDT_Base;
